startPoint.en: Talk to Morgan in Draynor Village.
startPoint.es: Habla con Morgan en Draynor Village.

items.name: Beer
items.display: Beer or 2 coins to purchase a pint

rewards.display: 4,825 experience lamp in either Attack, Strength, Defence, Constitution, Ranged, Magic or Necromancy (requires level 10 in respective skill)

rewards.name: I'm Counting on You
rewards.display: I'm Counting on You (During the fight)

text.en: Talk to Morgan in Draynor Village.
text.es: Habla con Morgan en Draynor Village.

text.en: Go upstairs and search in the northern drawers to get a garlic.
text.es: Sube las escaleras y busca en los cajones del norte para conseguir un ajo.

text.en: Go to the Blue Moon Inn located in Varrock.
text.es: Ve a la Blue Moon Inn, situada en Varrock.

chatOptions: 2 Are you Dr Harlow, the famous vampyre slayer?

text.en: Buy a beer from the bartender.
Talk to Dr. Harlow again to get a stake and stake hammer.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Dr. Harlow para conseguir una estaca y un martillo para estacas.

text.en: Go to Draynor Manor which is just north of Draynor Village.
text.es: Ve a Draynor Manor, justo al norte de Draynor Village.

text.en: Enter the manor and go to the east side.
text.es: Entra en la mansión y ve al lado este.

text.en: Open the coffin in the back of the room.
text.es: Abre el ataúd al fondo de la sala.

text.en: Fight Count Draynor until he is almost dead, your character will then automatically use the stake hammer on him to kill him.
text.es: Lucha contra Count Draynor hasta que esté casi muerto; tu personaje usará automáticamente el martillo para estacas sobre él para matarlo.
